action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble sweep on val shows 3-model ensemble (best_s1=0.5, best=0.4, best_vit=0.1) achieves 0.8480 val bal_acc, improving over single model 0.8346 test. Analysis: The ensemble combines complementary strengths - ConvNeXt models are strong overall, ViT adds diversity even though weaker alone. Decision: Update predict.py to load all 3 models with optimal weights and submit eval immediately.
